data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Order your favorite beverages delivered directly to your seat!

data.name: WideSelectionDescription
data.value: Choose from beer, soft drinks, water, coffee, and much more!

data.name: FastDeliveryDescription
data.value: Get your drinks delivered directly to your seat during the match!

data.name: EasyOrderingDescription
data.value: Simple interface - just enter your ticket number and order!

data.name: Step1
data.value: Browse our menu and add drinks to your cart

data.name: Step2
data.value: Enter your ticket number to confirm your seat

data.name: Step3
data.value: Submit your order and track its progress

data.name: Step4
data.value: Enjoy your drinks delivered directly to your seat!

data.name: LoginSubtitle
data.value: Access your account to order drinks

data.name: ConnectionError
data.value: Unable to connect to server. Please try again.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Register_Subtitle
data.value: Join to order drinks and buy tickets

data.name: Register_PasswordMinLength
data.value: Must be at least 6 characters long

data.name: Register_MustAcceptTerms
data.value: You must accept the terms to create an account

data.name: Register_RegistrationFailed
data.value: Registration failed. Email or username may already be in use.

data.name: Register_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Register_AccountCreatedSignIn
data.value: Account created successfully! Please sign in.

data.name: Orders_NoOrdersMessage
data.value: You haven't placed any orders. Ready to get started?

data.name: Menu_NoDrinksMessage
data.value: Sorry, no drinks are currently available for order.

data.name: Events_HeaderSubtitle
data.value: Discover exclusive sports events, concerts, and premium entertainment experiences. Secure your tickets and enjoy world-class concessions delivered to your seat.

data.name: Events_PleaseWaitCurating
data.value: Please wait while we curate the best experiences for you...

data.name: Events_NoEventsMessage
data.value: We couldn't find any premium events matching your criteria. Try adjusting your filters or check back later for new exclusive events.

data.name: EventDetails_EventNotFoundMessage
data.value: The requested event could not be found or is no longer available.

data.name: EventDetails_ClickSectionSeats
data.value: Click on a section to view available seats

data.name: EventDetails_NoSeatsAvailable
data.value: No seats available in this section.

data.name: Checkout_AgreeToTerms
data.value: I agree to the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy

data.name: Checkout_ProcessingPayment
data.value: Please wait while we process your payment and generate your tickets...

data.name: OrderConfirmation_OrderNotFoundMessage
data.value: We couldn't find your order. Please check your email for confirmation details or contact support.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_ConfirmedReady
data.value: Your order has been confirmed and your tickets are ready.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_ArriveInfo
data.value: Please arrive at the venue at least 30 minutes before the event start time.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_QRCodeInfo
data.value: Present your QR code tickets at the entrance for scanning.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_KeepSafeInfo
data.value: Keep your tickets safe and don't share the QR codes with others.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_SupportInfo
data.value: For any issues or questions, contact our support team.

data.name: Ordering_SessionExpiredMessage
data.value: Your ordering session has expired. Please scan your ticket again.

data.name: Ordering_ItemCurrentlyUnavailable
data.value: Sorry, this item is currently unavailable.

data.name: ComponentCheckout_CartEmptyExpired
data.value: Your cart is empty or session has expired.

data.name: ComponentCheckout_DeliveredTo
data.value: Your drinks will be delivered to:

data.name: ComponentCheckout_YoullReceiveUpdates
data.value: You'll receive updates on your order status

data.name: ComponentCheckout_DontClose
data.value: Please don't close this page or navigate away.

data.name: ComponentCheckout_PaymentEncrypted
data.value: Your payment information is encrypted and secure.

data.name: QRScanner_VerifyingTicket
data.value: Please wait while we verify your ticket

data.name: QRScanner_PositionQRCode
data.value: Position the QR code within the frame to start ordering

data.name: QRScanner_CantScan
data.value: Enter your ticket number if you can't scan

data.name: StadiumViewer_NotFound
data.value: Stadium structure not found. Please contact support if this problem persists.

data.name: StadiumViewer_UseMouseOrTouch
data.value: Use mouse or touch to select individual seats

data.name: StadiumMap_ClickToViewDetails
data.value: Click on a stand to view details and place orders

data.name: Wallet_NotEligibleMessage
data.value: Digital wallets are available to fans with a season ticket.

data.name: Wallet_ConfirmationRequired
data.value: Card confirmation required to complete your deposit.

data.name: Wallet_InsufficientFunds
data.value: Insufficient wallet balance. Please top up.

data.name: Login_IntroText
data.value: Sign in to see your next match and order from your seat.

data.name: Login_UnexpectedError
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Checkout_WaitMessage
data.value: Please wait, do not close the application.

data.name: Checkout_EmptyCartAlert
data.value: Cart is empty. Add tickets before payment.

data.name: DrinkSheet_DefaultDescription
data.value: Served cold and delivered to your seat.

data.name: DrinkSheet_SpecialInstructions
data.value: Special instructions (e.g., no ice, extra cup)

data.name: InstallPrompt_Description
data.value: Get the app for faster access and offline ordering

data.name: SurveyPrompt_Text2
data.value: and tell us what you think.

data.name: Logs_InfoAlert
data.value: This page shows your activity in the ordering system. Actions are logged to improve your experience and provide support.

data.name: Logs_OrdersDesc
data.value: All drink orders, changes and payments are recorded in your history.

data.name: Logs_QRDesc
data.value: QR code scans and ticket checks are logged for security.

data.name: Logs_AuthDesc
data.value: Sign-in attempts and security actions are tracked to protect your account.

data.name: Logs_HistoryDesc
data.value: Complete record of all orders and purchases.

data.name: Logs_SupportDesc
data.value: Detailed records help our team assist you faster.

data.name: Logs_SecurityDesc
data.value: Login and authentication tracking protects your account.

data.name: Logs_ImprovementsDesc
data.value: Usage patterns help us improve your experience.

data.name: Logs_PrivacyDesc
data.value: Your records are confidential and used only for service improvement and support. Only admins and authorized staff have access.

data.name: Logs_RecentActivity2
data.value: QR code scanning and ticket checks

data.name: Logs_ActivityLogged
data.value: Activity "{0}" has been logged. This is how we track your actions.

data.name: EventDetails_NotFound_Message
data.value: This match is no longer available.

data.name: EventDetails_SalesDisabled
data.value: Ticket sales via the app are currently unavailable.

data.name: EventDetails_SelectSection_Hint
data.value: Tap a stand on the map or in the list

data.name: EventDetails_NoPublishedSeats
data.value: No seats have been published for this match yet.

data.name: EventDetails_ShowSeatOnMap_AriaLabel
data.value: Show seat {0}, row {1} on stadium map

data.name: EventDetails_NoSeatsInSection
data.value: No available seats in this stand.

data.name: EventDetails_CartEmpty_Message
data.value: Your cart is empty. Choose seats from a stand.

data.name: Events_SalesDisabled
data.value: 🎟️ Ticket sales via the app are not currently available. You can view events below.

data.name: Events_Empty_Message
data.value: No events match your filters right now.

data.name: Home_NoPass_Title
data.value: You don't have a season pass

data.name: Home_NoPass_Message
data.value: No season ticket found on this account. Here for a single match? Scan your ticket.

data.name: Home_NoLiveEvent
data.value: No live match right now. Ordering opens when the match starts.

data.name: Profile_InfoNote
data.value: Fill in your first name, last name, and OIB — they're used to verify your identity when you add money to your wallet at the bar.

data.name: Profile_OIBHint
data.value: Exactly 11 digits. Leave empty if you don't want to save it.

data.name: Profile_LoadError
data.value: Could not load profile. Try again.

data.name: Profile_SaveError
data.value: Save failed. Check your information and try again.

data.name: Profile_ConnectionError
data.value: Could not connect to the server.

data.name: Menu_EmptyDescription
data.value: No drinks or snacks available right now.

data.name: Menu_OrderNotSentMessage
data.value: Order not sent. Check ticket number and try again.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_NotFound_Message
data.value: We cannot find this order. Check the link or try again.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_SuccessMessage
data.value: Your tickets are confirmed and ready.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_ArriveEarly
data.value: Arrive at least 30 minutes before the event.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_ShowQRCode
data.value: Show the QR code from your ticket at the entrance.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_KeepSafe
data.value: Keep your tickets safe — each QR code is valid only once.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_SupportContact
data.value: For help, contact our support team.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_DownloadNotReady
data.value: PDF download will be available soon.

data.name: OrderConfirmation_EmailSent
data.value: Tickets have been sent to your email address.

data.name: Orders_Empty_Message
data.value: When you order a drink or snack, your orders will appear here.

data.name: Order_NoSession_Message
data.value: Scan the QR code on your ticket and your drink will arrive at your seat — no queue waiting.

data.name: Order_Paused_Message
data.value: You can only order drinks during the match. Your seat is waiting — come back when the referee starts the game.

data.name: Cart_OrderingClosed
data.value: Ordering is closed because the match is not happening right now.

data.name: Cart_InsufficientTicketBalance
data.value: Insufficient balance on ticket. Top up at the bar or pay with card.

data.name: Cart_InsufficientWalletBalance
data.value: Insufficient wallet balance. Top up wallet or pay with card.

data.name: Cart_OrderFailed
data.value: Could not send order. Please try again.

data.name: Register_IntroText
data.value: Register for faster ordering and tracking your orders.

data.name: Register_OIBHint
data.value: Used for identity verification when adding funds at the bar.

data.name: Register_TermsError
data.value: You must accept the terms of service.

data.name: Scan_HintText
data.value: Point your phone's camera at the QR code on the ticket — the app opens automatically.

data.name: SetPassword_GreetingMain
data.value: Set password to activate your account{0}.

data.name: SetPassword_CheckError
data.value: An error occurred while checking the link.

data.name: MyTickets_Empty_Message
data.value: When you buy a ticket, it will appear here with a receipt and PDF card.

data.name: MyTickets_NoOrders
data.value: No drink orders for this ticket.

data.name: MyTickets_PDFGenerationError
data.value: Unable to generate PDF. Try again.

data.name: Wallet_NotEligible_Message
data.value: Wallet is only available to season pass holders.

data.name: Wallet_CardNotReady
data.value: Card payments are not ready. Refresh the page.

data.name: Wallet_PaymentReceived
data.value: Payment received. Funds will be available shortly.

data.name: StadiumMap_SelectPrompt
data.value: 👆 Tap a stand for sector details.

data.name: Welcome_HeroLede
data.value: Order from your seat, we'll bring it to the stand. Never miss a goal over a beer.

data.name: Welcome_NoOrdersYet
data.value: No orders on this ticket yet.

data.name: Welcome_FundsAvailableNote
data.value: Funds are immediately available for ordering drinks.

data.name: Welcome_RefundNote
data.value: Amount is refunded to your card.

data.name: Welcome_TopupError_SessionExpired
data.value: Session expired. Scan your ticket again.

data.name: Welcome_TopupError_NotEligible
data.value: Wallet not available for this account.

data.name: Welcome_WithdrawError_InsufficientFunds
data.value: You don't have enough funds for withdrawal.

data.name: Welcome_WithdrawError_SessionExpired
data.value: Session expired. Scan your ticket again.

data.name: EventDetails_SectorMapUnavailable
data.value: The map for this sector is unavailable.

data.name: EventDetails_SeatsAddFailed
data.value: Some seats could not be added to the cart.
